name: Mars Bar 51g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Standard countline, top seller in UK vending.

name: Snickers 48g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Strong seller, comparable to Mars.

name: KitKat 4 Finger 41.5g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.60. Slightly lighter bar, lower wholesale than Mars/Snickers.

name: Twirl 43g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.60. Cadbury countline, consistent seller.

name: Dairy Milk 45g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Flagship Cadbury bar.

name: Maltesers 37g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.60. Bag format, lighter weight.

name: Skittles Fruits 45g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.40-0.55. Sugar confectionery, lower wholesale than chocolate.

name: Haribo Starmix 40g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.40-0.55. Grab bag format for vending.

name: Kinder Bueno 43g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.55-0.70. Premium countline, higher wholesale than standard bars.

name: Bounty 57g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Twin bar, slightly heavier.

name: Walkers Cheese & Onion Grab Bag 45g
notes: Confirmed — JJ Food Service from £15.49/case of 32 (£0.48/bag collection price, 20+ cases). Standard delivery £20.99/case (£0.66/bag). Grab bag format essential for vending.

name: Walkers Ready Salted Grab Bag 45g
notes: Confirmed — JJ Food Service from £15.49/case of 32 (£0.48/bag collection price, 20+ cases). Second most popular Walkers flavour.

name: McCoy's Salt & Vinegar Grab Bag 45g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.60. Ridge cut, perceived premium over Walkers.

name: Doritos Chilli Heatwave 40g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Tortilla chip, popular in younger demographics.

name: Pom-Bear Original 19g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.30-0.45. Lighter pack, kid-friendly, lower price point.

name: Kettle Lightly Salted 40g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.55-0.75. Premium positioning, smaller case sizes push cost up.

name: Quavers Cheese 34g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.38-0.55. Lighter snack, grab bag format.

name: Wotsits Really Cheesy 36g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.38-0.55. Grab bag format for vending.

name: Coca-Cola Original 330ml Can
notes: Confirmed — MX Wholesale £13.00/case of 24 (£0.54/can). Other suppliers £9.99-£13.00/case. Number one selling vending SKU in UK.

name: Diet Coke 330ml Can
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.40-0.55. Strong office performer.

name: Fanta Orange 330ml Can
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.38-0.50. Third in Coca-Cola range.

name: Pepsi 330ml Can
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.35-0.50. Often slightly cheaper wholesale than Coke.

name: 7Up 330ml Can
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.35-0.50. Lemon-lime alternative.

name: Lucozade Original 380ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.55-0.75. Bottle format, higher wholesale than cans. HFSS note.

name: Lipton Iced Tea Peach 330ml Can
notes: Confirmed vend price £1.80 (user data). Wholesale est. £0.50-0.65. Growing category.

name: Monster Energy 500ml Can
notes: Confirmed — Bestway £9.89/case of 12 (£0.82/can). PMP £1.65-£1.75. Vend price above PMP acceptable in captive locations.

name: Red Bull 250ml Can
notes: Confirmed — MX Wholesale £1.35/can PMP. Wholesale range £1.35-1.65/can across suppliers. Tight margin at £2.00 vend; consider £2.20 in premium locations.

name: Oasis Citrus Punch 500ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Juice drink, 500ml bottle.

name: Highland Spring Still 500ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.18-0.30. Best margin category in vending. Scottish water, strong UK brand.

name: Highland Spring Sparkling 500ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.18-0.30. Lower volume than still but good margin.

name: Evian 500ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.25-0.38. Premium water, higher wholesale but supports higher vend price.

name: Volvic 500ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.22-0.35. Mid-range positioning between Highland Spring and Evian.

name: Grenade Carb Killa Cookie Dough 60g
notes: Confirmed — Brakes £20.13/case of 12 (£1.68/bar). PriceSpy best price £18.99/12 (£1.58). Top protein bar in UK.

name: Grenade Carb Killa Oreo 60g
notes: Confirmed — Brakes £20.28/case of 12 (£1.69/bar). Second most popular Grenade flavour.

name: Trek Protein Flapjack Cocoa Oat 50g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.75-1.00. Vegan, lower wholesale than Grenade. Plant-based appeal.

name: Nakd Cocoa Delight 35g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.45-0.65. Raw fruit/nut bar, lighter weight. Vegan, gluten-free.

name: Fulfil Chocolate & Hazelnut 55g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £1.10-1.50. Vitamin-enriched protein bar. Growing brand.

name: Optimum Nutrition Protein Shake Chocolate 330ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £1.60-2.00. RTD shake, heavy/bulky. Needs bottom row in machine. Gym-primary.

name: Grenade Protein Shake Chocolate Insanity 330ml
notes: Est. — benchmark range £1.40-1.80. RTD shake, smaller case size. Gym-primary location.

name: Barebells Protein Bar Salty Peanut 55g
notes: Est. — benchmark range £1.20-1.50. Swedish brand, growing fast in UK. Premium positioning.

name: Nescafe Gold Blend (per cup)
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.06-0.10 per cup. Ingredient cost includes cup, sugar, whitener. Assumes 2.5g per cup + consumables.

name: PG Tips Tea (per cup)
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.04-0.07 per cup. Lowest cost hot drink. Tea bag + cup + milk powder.

name: Cadbury Hot Chocolate (per cup)
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.10-0.15 per cup. Higher ingredient cost than coffee/tea. Strong brand pull.

name: Kenco Rich Roast (per cup)
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.08-0.12 per cup. Perceived step up from Nescafe in office settings.

name: Options Hot Chocolate (per cup)
notes: Est. — benchmark range £0.10-0.18 per cup. Low-calorie hot choc, appeals to health-conscious. Higher per-cup cost due to smaller tins.
